label: Pricing Table
summary: Instructions-only soft dossier for rendering a service/package pricing table with 2-4 tiers, per-tier feature checkmarks, optional 'most popular' badge and a clear CTA per tier. Server-rendered, semantic table-or-grid structure, no Stripe integration (the CTA is a tel:/mailto:/external booking link — same pattern as booking-cta). Hard alternatives (stripe-pricing-table, paddle-checkout) are planned imports for sites that need real card-on-file conversion.
